getEngineModeSuccessRemote: Get connection mode success - remote mode
getEngineModeSuccessLocal: Get connection mode success - local mode
getEngineModeDefault: Failed to get connection mode - default (local) mode
checkingEngineInstalled: Checking if local engine is installed...
engineInstalledConnecting: Local engine installed, preparing to connect...
engineNotInstalled: Local engine not installed, preparing to start engine installation pop-up
startingLocalEngine: Local normal permission engine mode, starting local engine - port: {{port}}
manuallyDisconnected: Manually disconnected, please click to connect to the engine manually
cannotExportProject: Current project has no key information, cannot export!
updateEngineTitle: Update engine, all local processes need to be closed
updateEngineDesc: Close all engines, including the currently connected local engine process, and the page will enter the loading page.
projectSyncFailed: {{name}} project data synchronization failed, please upload manually
autoReverseConfigSuccess: Auto-start - global reverse connection configuration successful
engineNotOfficial: Engine is not an official release version
engineNotOfficialDesc: May cause problems in local use
mitmCertDesc: MITM certificate is not in the system trust list, please reinstall
pcapNotFixedDesc: May affect the use of some functions, it is recommended to fix it as soon as possible
runAsAdmin: It is recommended to run the software as an administrator
runAsAdminDesc: Normal permissions may affect the use of some functions
noLocalPluginDesc: One-click to get official cloud plugin source
chromePathDesc: If Chrome cannot be started, please configure the Chrome startup path
funcDomain.signOutRemoteConfirm: Clicking sign out will automatically exit remote control, are you sure you want to exit?
funcDomain.controlledSideDesc: Copy the key and share it with the controller user
funcDomain.controllerSideDesc: You can remotely control his client through the key shared by the controlled side
funcDomain.inputNodeParamsError: Please enter ip/domain, port number, node name
funcDomain.runNodeDesc: Running nodes will occupy engine resources. It is recommended to use Yakit moderately when running nodes, otherwise it will cause the node to run tasks slowly. You can run multiple nodes (running on different platforms, or the same platform with different node names).
mainOperator.renderCrashDesc: A crash has been detected on the rendering side. Click View Log to view the crash log. After ignoring, you can view it in the system settings
mainOperator.remoteRequestContent: User {{name}} is requesting a remote connection to you, do you agree to the connection?
mainOperator.migrateDataDesc: Due to the reconstruction of the IRify function, in order not to affect the use, you need to click OK to migrate the old data. Data migration will not cause any data loss.
mainOperator.avatarFileTypeLimit: {{name}} is not a png, png, jpeg file, please upload the correct format file!
mainOperator.remoteRequestContentRich: is requesting a remote connection to you, do you agree to the connection?
